elements.title: Proton: Privacy by default
elements.meta_description: Over 100 million people use Proton to stay private and secure online. Get a free Proton account and take back your privacy.
elements.h1: A better internet starts with privacy and freedom
elements.hero_subheadline: Take control of your data with end-to-end encryption.
h2s: Defend your digital life from hackers. Effortlessly.
Powerful AI that respects your privacy.
Protect your business with easy-to-use encrypted solutions.
With Proton, your data belongs to you, not tech companies, governments, or hackers.
Over 100 million people and businesses have signed up for Proton
Our story begins at CERN, where the web was born
Built by the community, for the community
Choose an internet where your privacy comes first
